steps: The problem gives a conversion rate: 3 teaspoons = 1 tablespoon. To convert from tablespoons to teaspoons, multiply by 3.
Check the answer choices: 132 appears as choice C.
No other choice matches: 47 = 44 + 3 (wrong operation), 88 = 44 × 2 (wrong multiplier), 176 = 44 × 4 (wrong multiplier). Only 132 is correct.

choices.explanation: • 47 = 44 + 3, which adds the conversion factor instead of multiplying. This is not the correct operation for unit conversion. This is incorrect.
• 88 = 44 × 2. There is no basis for multiplying by 2; the conversion factor is 3 teaspoons per tablespoon. This is incorrect.
• $44 \text{ tablespoons} \times 3 \frac{\text{teaspoons}}{\text{tablespoon}} = 132 \text{ teaspoons}$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
• 176 = 44 × 4. There is no basis for multiplying by 4. This is incorrect.
